prompt:
Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: character-free 16:9 background plate for scene 1
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style reference only; do not copy its composition
Primary request: a winding ancient Chinese mountain path leading between a clear spring and a small temple at the summit, showing the long daily water-fetching route
Style/medium: match Image 1's handcrafted layered rice-paper collage, torn edges, paper fibers, restrained ink accents and warm child-friendly palette
Composition/framing: wide landscape with a generous open walking area across the middle and lower third for a separate character layer; distant temple and spring both readable
Lighting/mood: fresh golden morning, diligent and hopeful
Constraints: timeless setting, no specific dynasty, no people, no animals, no text, no logo, no watermark, no modern objects; leave lower subtitle area visually quiet
